content: Immutable PG audit pattern: append-only table + REVOKE UPDATE,DELETE from app role + BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE trigger raising exception; tamper evidence via hash chain (row hash = HMAC(prev_hash || canonical payload)), optional periodic root anchoring to external store (e.g., S3 object lock). Append-only alone is not tamper-evident if the same role can insert and alter. No extension required.
